title: Right of Option

The user may be a jobseeker who has recently lost a higher-paying job and is considering whether to exercise this right to receive higher daily allowances, despite losing access to previously accrued benefits. Relevance is determined by documents that clearly explain the conditions, process, and financial trade-offs involved in exercising the right of option.
